questions.original_question: Can you contractually guarantee a 15-minute RTO for every single-tenant and customer-managed deployment?
questions.confidence_reason: The references show the managed production service has RPO = 15 minutes and RTO = 4 hours (not a 15-minute RTO), and that customer-managed deployments are not the default and require separate scoping/professional services. There is no statement that the vendor can contractually guarantee a 15-minute RTO for every single-tenant or customer-managed deployment, so the provided references are insufficient to support such a guarantee.

references.matched_answer: The managed service target is 99.9 percent monthly availability, subject to the contracted service definition.

references.matched_answer: For the managed production service, the recovery point objective is 15 minutes and the recovery time objective is 4 hours.
